_ww-text_text.en: I have safely stored my username, password, and recovery phrase.
Your account will be completely anonymous. We do not require an email address or any personal identification.
IMPORTANT: Save these credentials now. They cannot be recovered.

interactions.name: Copy Recovery Phrase

__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.name: Copy recovery phrase to clipboard
__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.__wwdescription: Copy the recovery phrase variable to clipboard using navigator.clipboard.writeText

interactions.description: On click: copy the value of variables['3a7a238b-5d5c-4fee-8e76-ee74abda3de9'] to the clipboard

en.code: wwFormulas.if(variables['a849b796-d6b0-42ce-b0fa-95493b3092e3'], variables['a849b796-d6b0-42ce-b0fa-95493b3092e3'], 'An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.')

interactions.name: Copy Username to Clipboard

__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.name: Copy Username to Clipboard
__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.__wwdescription: Copy the tempUsername variable value to clipboard using navigator.clipboard.writeText

interactions.description: On click: copy the value of the tempUsername variable to the clipboard

interactions.name: Reset Signup State

__CLEAR_ERROR_MSG__.name: Clear error message
__CLEAR_ERROR_MSG__.__wwdescription: Set errorMsg variable to empty string

interactions.description: Reset signup step to idle and clear error message on button click

default.animationKeyframes: @keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(24px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

interactions.name: Generate Account - Button Click

__SET_GENERATING__.name: Set signup step to generating
__SET_GENERATING__.__wwdescription: Update signupStep variable to 'generating' before starting credential generation

__TRIGGER_GENERATION__.name: Execute credential generation workflow
__TRIGGER_GENERATION__.__wwdescription: Call the Generate Anonymous Credentials workflow to create username, password, and recovery phrase

interactions.description: On button click: set signup step to generating and trigger the account credential generation workflow

interactions.name: Copy Password to Clipboard

__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.name: Copy password to clipboard
__COPY_TO_CLIPBOARD__.__wwdescription: Copy the tempPassword variable to clipboard using navigator.clipboard.writeText()

interactions.description: On click: copy the tempPassword variable value to the clipboard

interactions.name: Checkbox Change Handler

__UPDATE_HAS_ACKNOWLEDGED__.name: Update hasAcknowledged variable
__UPDATE_HAS_ACKNOWLEDGED__.__wwdescription: Set hasAcknowledged to the checkbox value from the change event

interactions.description: On checkbox change, update hasAcknowledged variable with the checkbox value

interactions.name: Checkbox Init Value Change Handler

__SET_INIT_VALUE__.name: Set initial value from variable
__SET_INIT_VALUE__.__wwdescription: Set the checkbox initial value to the current hasAcknowledged variable value

interactions.description: On initValueChange, set the checkbox initial value from hasAcknowledged variable

__HANDLE_ERROR__.name: Error Handler Block
__HANDLE_ERROR__.title: Error Handler Block
__HANDLE_ERROR__.__wwdescription: Catch and process any errors that occurred during credential generation or signup

__SET_PASSWORD__.name: Store generated password
__SET_PASSWORD__.__wwdescription: Update tempPassword variable with the generated secure password

__SET_USERNAME__.name: Store generated username
__SET_USERNAME__.__wwdescription: Update tempUsername variable with the generated username

__TRY_GENERATE__.name: Try/Catch credential generation and signup
__TRY_GENERATE__.__wwdescription: Wrap entire credential generation and signup flow in try/catch to handle any errors gracefully

__CREATE_PROFILE__.name: Create user profile record
__CREATE_PROFILE__.__wwdescription: Insert a new record into the profiles table with user_id and baseline_notes. Note: id and username fields are NOT mapped; id is auto-generated and username is stored in auth metadata

__DEBUG_RESPONSE__.name: Debug Signup Response
__DEBUG_RESPONSE__.__wwdescription: Log the raw Supabase signup response to console for debugging purposes

__SET_ERROR_STEP__.name: Set signup step to error
__SET_ERROR_STEP__.__wwdescription: Update signupStep to 'error' to indicate failure

__SET_GENERATING__.name: Set signup step to generating
__SET_GENERATING__.__wwdescription: Update signupStep to 'generating' to indicate credential generation is in progress

__EXTRACT_USER_ID__.name: Extract user ID from signup response
__EXTRACT_USER_ID__.__wwdescription: Extract the user.id from Supabase signup response with multiple fallback paths and error handling

__UPDATE_ERROR_MSG__.name: Store error message
__UPDATE_ERROR_MSG__.__wwdescription: Update errorMsg variable with the error message

__GENERATE_PASSWORD__.name: Generate secure password
__GENERATE_PASSWORD__.__wwdescription: Create 16-character password with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters

__GENERATE_USERNAME__.name: Generate random username
__GENERATE_USERNAME__.__wwdescription: Create adjective-noun-number combination for anonymous username

__SET_ERROR_MESSAGE__.code: return context.workflow?.['__TRY_GENERATE__']?.error?.message || 'An unexpected error occurred during signup.';
__SET_ERROR_MESSAGE__.name: Extract error message
__SET_ERROR_MESSAGE__.__wwdescription: Get error message from the caught exception

__RESET_ACKNOWLEDGED__.name: Reset acknowledgement flag
__RESET_ACKNOWLEDGED__.__wwdescription: Reset hasAcknowledged to false at the start of the signup flow

__SET_RECOVERY_PHRASE__.name: Store recovery phrase
__SET_RECOVERY_PHRASE__.__wwdescription: Update tempRecoveryPhrase variable with the generated 12-word recovery phrase

__SET_CREDENTIALS_STEP__.name: Set signup step to credentials
__SET_CREDENTIALS_STEP__.__wwdescription: Update signupStep to 'credentials' to indicate successful generation and account creation. This enables the 'Go to Dashboard' button when combined with hasAcknowledged checkbox

__SUPABASE_AUTH_SIGNUP__.name: Supabase Auth signup
__SUPABASE_AUTH_SIGNUP__.__wwdescription: Call Supabase Auth signup endpoint with synthetic email and password using correct environment variables. Includes both apikey and Authorization headers with SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY

__CREATE_CONSENT_RECORD__.name: Create consent record
__CREATE_CONSENT_RECORD__.__wwdescription: Insert a new record into the consent_records table with complete consent metadata. is_agreed is boolean true, timestamp uses ISO format

__GENERATE_RECOVERY_PHRASE__.name: Generate recovery phrase
__GENERATE_RECOVERY_PHRASE__.__wwdescription: Create 12-word BIP39-style recovery phrase from word list
